LumiInteraction.title: LumiAI Interaction
LumiInteraction.description: A message interaction in the LumiAI platform.

userId.description: The unique ID of the user who sent the message.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

userPhoto.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

timestamp.description: The time the message was sent.

type.description: The type of interaction (user or agent).

/lumiai_interactions/{interactionId}.description: Collection of messages for the LumiAI platform.
